# `ai` - database schema slice

Source of truth: [`backend/prisma/schema.prisma`](../../../prisma/schema.prisma).
This file mirrors the Prisma models owned by this feature so the schema is
co-located with the code that reads/writes it. Regenerate via:

```bash
pwsh backend/scripts/scaffold-feature-schemas.ps1
```

## `AiScan`

```prisma
model AiScan {
  id            String   @id @default(uuid())
  userId        String
  billId        String?
  transactionId String?
  extractedJson String
  confidence    Float
  provider      String   @default("gemini")
  processingMs  Int?
  status        String   @default("completed")
  errorMessage  String?
  createdAt     DateTime @default(now())
  user          User     @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@index([userId])
  @@index([billId])
  @@index([createdAt])
  @@schema("public")
}
```

## `ai_events`

```prisma
model ai_events {
  id            String   @id
  user_id       String
  event_type    String
  metadata_json Json
  created_at    DateTime @default(now())

  @@index([created_at], map: "idx_ai_events_created_at")
  @@index([event_type], map: "idx_ai_events_type")
  @@index([user_id], map: "idx_ai_events_user_id")
  @@schema("public")
}
```

## `ai_insights`

```prisma
model ai_insights {
  id                String   @id
  user_id           String
  insight_type      String
  insight_data_json Json
  confidence_score  Float
  created_at        DateTime @default(now())

  @@index([created_at], map: "idx_ai_insights_created_at")
  @@index([insight_type], map: "idx_ai_insights_type")
  @@index([user_id], map: "idx_ai_insights_user_id")
  @@schema("public")
}
```

## `ai_model_runs`

```prisma
model ai_model_runs {
  id              String    @id
  run_type        String
  status          String
  started_at      DateTime  @default(now())
  completed_at    DateTime?
  processed_users Int       @default(0)
  notes           String?

  @@index([started_at], map: "idx_ai_runs_started_at")
  @@index([run_type], map: "idx_ai_runs_type")
  @@schema("public")
}
```
